products.name: HGuide o480 Inertial/GNSS Navigator
products.descriptor: Compact MEMS INS/GNSS navigator for UAVs, loitering munitions, and unmanned vehicles

evidence.snippet: Honeywell Aerospace's HGuide o480 INS/GNSS Navigator delivers resilient navigation for autonomous, low-cost platforms like Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAVs), loitering munitions, and unmanned ground or marine vehicles.

products.name: Honeywell Compact Inertial Navigation System (HCINS)
products.descriptor: MEMS-based compact INS for all UAV classes, GPS-denied capable

evidence.snippet: **The Honeywell Aerospace Compact Inertial Navigation System (HCINS) is a low size, weight, and power (SWaP) solution designed for all classes of unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs). Engineered to ensure safe and reliable navigation during intermittent GNSS disruptions.**

products.notes: Designed in the EU per Key Benefits list; ECCN 7A994, no export license required.

products.name: Honeywell Radar Velocity System (HRVS)
products.descriptor: mmWave radar velocity-aiding system for GPS-denied UAV and vehicle navigation

evidence.snippet: The Honeywell Radar Velocity System (HRVS) is a compact, lightweight, and low-power radar-based navigation-aiding solution designed for resilient UAV operations. Leveraging advanced millimeter wave sensing technology (60–64 GHz or 76–81 GHz), HRVS delivers precise range, velocity, and angle measurements with centimeter-level accuracy—regardless of environmental conditions such as rain, fog, dust, or snow.

*   Honeywell Radar Velocity System for Commercial Vehicles (HRVS-CV)
*   Honeywell Radar Velocity System for Military Vehicles (HRVS-M)
*   Honeywell Radar Velocity System for UAVs (HRVS-U)
*   Radar (mmWave)
*   #### **Key Benefits**

products.notes: Three variants: HRVS-U (UAVs), HRVS-CV (commercial vehicles), HRVS-M (military vehicles). Part of Honeywell Resilient UAV Navigation Suite with HCINS and GPSdome.

products.name: HGuide i700 MEMS IMU
products.descriptor: Near-navigation-grade MEMS IMU for UAVs and robotics, export-restriction-free

evidence.snippet:
The Honeywell HGuide i700 MEMS IMU delivers reliable, near–navigation-grade performance in a compact, low SWaP C package—without international export restrictions.
With its small footprint and industrial grade durability, the HGuide i700 is ideal for a wide range of demanding applications, including:

products.name: HGuide o360 Inertial/GNSS Navigator
products.descriptor: Single-card INS/GNSS navigator with dual-antenna RTK for ultra-low SWAP platforms

evidence.snippet: **The HGuide o360 is a single-card INS/GNSS, all attitude Inertial/GNSS Navigator designed for any platform where high- performance navigation data is required in an ultra-low SWAP package. HGuide o360 INS/GNSS navigator contains a powerful dual-antenna, multifrequency, multi-constellation, RTK capable GNSS receiver, and Honeywell’s leading- edge i300 IMU technology and a high- grade calibrated Magnetometer.**

products.name: GPSdome-SunStone
products.descriptor: GNSS anti-jamming add-on device for UAVs and unmanned vehicle platforms

evidence.snippet: **The GPSdome-SunStone, by infiniDome, is a small add-on device that provides the first layer of protection against GNSS jamming attempts, ensuring continuity of operation during low-power jamming conditions and the ability to achieve the crucial first GPS lock even in GPS-challenged environments. GPSdome is compatible with any off-the-shelf GNSS receiver and antenna.**

products.name: HGuide i300 MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit
products.descriptor: Small industrial-grade no-export-license MEMS IMU for UAVs and land/sea platforms

evidence.snippet: The HGuide i300 is a small, no-license required, industrial grade MEMS IMU. HGuide i300 uses proven inertial sensor technology and is perfect for customers who require an advanced precision inertial solution on land, air or sea.

products.notes: Built at Honeywell facility in the USA. ECCN 7A994, generally available without export license.

products.name: HGuide HG4930 S-Class MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit
products.descriptor: High-bandwidth tactical MEMS IMU for gimbal and antenna stabilization

evidence.snippet: The HG4930-S is an ultra-rugged tactical grade MEMS IMU designed for stabilisation applications where space is a premium. Based on 20 years of legacy development it is capable of matching performance of some FOG based IMUs in a lower SWaP-C package with vastly increased reliability.

products.notes: Built at Honeywell facility in the USA. ECCN 7A994, no export license required. Optimized for closed-loop stabilization vs. standard HG4930.

products.name: HGuide HG4930 MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit
products.descriptor: Ultra-rugged tactical-grade MEMS IMU for UAVs and loitering munitions

evidence.snippet: The HG4930 is an ultra-rugged tactical grade MEMS IMU designed for use in very challenging environments. Based on 20 years of legacy development it is capable of matching performance of some FOG based IMUs in a lower SWaP-C package with vastly increased reliability.

products.notes: Built at Honeywell facility in the USA. ECCN 7A994, no export license required. HG1930 higher-dynamics variant requires export license.

products.name: HGuide i400 MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit
products.descriptor: Ultra-compact near-tactical grade MEMS IMU, no export license required

evidence.snippet: The HGuide i400 is an ultra-compact near-tactical grade, no-license required, MEMS IMU.HGuide i400 uses proven inertial sensor technology and is perfect for customers who require a low SWaP-C near-tactical grade precision inertial solution for land, air or sea platforms.The i400 also supports accurate and dependable guidance, control and pointing capabilities under the most demanding environments.

products.notes: Built at a Honeywell Aerospace facility. ECCN 7A994. Country of manufacture not stated on page.

products.name: HG3900 MEMS Inertial Measurement Unit
products.descriptor: All-silicon MEMS IMU, tactical grade, validated by U.S. Army

evidence.snippet: The next generation HG3900 IMU uses all-silicon MEMS (microelectromechanical system) technology to create a low size, weight and power (SWaP) package that performs as well or better than similar-sized IMUs using fiber optic gyroscope (FOG) or ring laser gyroscope (RLG) technology.

products.notes: Designed and built at Honeywell Aerospace facility in the USA. ECCN 7A003.d.1, export license generally required.

products.name: Embedded GPS/INS (EGI)
products.descriptor: Tightly-coupled military GPS/INS navigation family including H-764 and FALCN variants

evidence.snippet:
**The EGI family includes the H-764, in use on most military aircraft, and the FALCN, providing all the features and performance of the H-764 in a smaller package. The H-764 legacy uses a larger chassis to maintain commonality with legacy aircraft.
These systems are self-contained, all-attitude, tightly-coupled navigation systems that provide the following outputs:**

products.name: HMC2003 3-Axis Magnetometer
products.descriptor: High-sensitivity factory-calibrated analog 3-axis AMR magnetometer for navigation and UAVs

products.name: HMR2300 3-Axis Magnetometer
products.descriptor: Smart digital 3-axis magnetoresistive magnetometer for compassing and UAV navigation

products.name: Integrated Compassing Solutions (HMC6343 & HMR3300)
products.descriptor: Compact tilt-compensated digital compass modules for UAVs and industrial systems

products.name: HMC6343
products.descriptor: Tilt-compensated integrated electronic compass module with MEMS accelerometer in LCC package

evidence.snippet:
**Honeywell HMC6343 - Integrated, Tilt-Compensated Compass Module**
The **Honeywell HMC6343** is a fully integrated electronic compass module featuring built-in firmware for heading computation and magnetic distortion calibration. It combines a three-axis magnetoresistive sensor, three-axis MEMS accelerometer, analog and digital support circuits, a microprocessor, and proprietary algorithms—all within a compact 9.0mm x 9.0mm x 1.9mm LCC package.

products.notes: Listed under 'Integrated Compassing Solutions' page alongside HMR3300. Uses Honeywell AMR technology.

products.name: HMR3300
products.descriptor: Digital tilt-compensated compass for UAV precision heading, RoHS 3 compliant

evidence.snippet:
**Honeywell HMR3300 – Digital Compass for Precision Heading**
The **Honeywell HMR3300** is a digital compass solution engineered for precision heading applications. Utilizing Honeywell’s magnetoresistive sensor technology, it offers reliable, accurate performance in a compact, solid-state design.

products.notes: Listed under 'Integrated Compassing Solutions' page alongside HMC6343. Supports ±60° tilt range, RS-232/RS-485 output.
